positive: A maximalist, stylized celestial forest scene. Depict a cluster of interlocking, bioluminescent flora and fauna—glowing mushrooms, winding vine structures, and abstract crystalline roots—forming a vibrant, intricate pattern. The central composition should feature a stylized, majestic full moon hanging amidst the canopy, casting patterned light on the foreground. Use a high-contrast, neo-Art Deco, stylized illustration style, reminiscent of deep jungle patterns. Color palette should be dominated by rich sapphire blues, emerald greens, and accents of luminous gold and turquoise. Ensure the lines are crisp, the contrast is dramatic, and the design is perfectly circular and repeatable, suitable for textile printing. Clean silhouettes are essential. Studio quality, vector art feel, no gradient blur.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, poorly drawn, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, fuzzy, grain, realistic photo, 3d rendering, gradients
